overview.label: Overview
overview.summary: A bright factory map for exploring the Owned Media Index. Pick a machine, inspect its patterns, and save useful cards.

produce.label: Produce
produce.summary: Captures raw expert conversations before they degrade into scattered files.

patterns.title: OBS Production Standard
patterns.whatItIs: A repeatable live production setup for recording, overlays, scenes, audio, and backup capture.
patterns.qualityBar: Clean audio, clear visuals, stable scenes, and a usable backup recording.
patterns.prompt: Turn this recording workflow into a reusable production checklist for a recurring owned media show.

package.label: Package
package.summary: Transforms source sessions into titles, descriptions, clips, thumbnails, chapters, quotes, and guest assets.

patterns.title: Guest Story Arc
patterns.whatItIs: A description pattern that frames the guest’s story, the lesson, and the application for the audience.
patterns.qualityBar: The description should make the guest relevant, name the tension, and promise a usable takeaway.
patterns.prompt: Write an episode description using Guest Story Arc: guest context, tension, lesson, and audience application.

patterns.title: Top Performing Title Styles
patterns.whatItIs: A title framework for turning a topic into a clear reason to click.
patterns.qualityBar: The title should signal the audience, the topic, and the reason it matters.
patterns.prompt: Generate 10 title options using curiosity, contrarian, benefit-driven, and how-to structures.

publish.label: Publish
publish.summary: Moves packaged assets into channels while the owned website remains the canonical home.

patterns.title: Canonical Episode Page
patterns.whatItIs: A durable owned page that gives each episode, webinar, or session a stable home.
patterns.qualityBar: The page should contain the core asset, summary, transcript or notes, guest context, links, and conversion path.
patterns.prompt: Create a canonical episode page outline with hero, summary, key moments, guest context, transcript, related links, and CTA.

prove.label: Prove
prove.summary: Scores patterns, checks evidence, and turns performance back into system learning.

patterns.title: Pattern Scoring
patterns.whatItIs: A way to rank patterns by usefulness, repeatability, evidence, and fit for real production.
patterns.qualityBar: A high score should mean the pattern is useful, repeatable, evidence-informed, and practical.
patterns.prompt: Score this owned media pattern from 1 to 5 using usefulness, evidence, repeatability, and production fit.

preserve.label: Preserve
preserve.summary: Stores transcripts, tags, speaker labels, metadata, and retrieval paths so every session feeds the next one.

patterns.title: Content Memory Standard
patterns.whatItIs: A structured way to preserve sessions so the archive becomes searchable and reusable.
patterns.qualityBar: Saved content should include clean transcripts, speaker labels, timestamps, metadata, tags, access rules, and retrieval paths.
patterns.prompt: Convert this session into a content memory entry with transcript metadata, speaker labels, topic tags, and retrieval notes.
